'''âsh-k-f''' ('''kashakaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magicalize|magicalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magicalize|magicalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kashakaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishakaf|thishakaf]] || [[word:jishakaf|jishakaf]] || [[word:shishakaf|shishakaf]] || [[word:kishakaf|kishakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushakaf|thuthushakaf]] || [[word:jujushakaf|jujushakaf]] || [[word:shushushakaf|shushushakaf]] || [[word:kukushakaf|kukushakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushakaf|thushakaf]] || [[word:jushakaf|jushakaf]] || [[word:shushakaf|shushakaf]] || [[word:kushakaf|kushakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushakaf|thushakaf]] || [[word:jushakaf|jushakaf]] || [[word:shushakaf|shushakaf]] || [[word:kushakaf|kushakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshakaf|theshakaf]] || [[word:jeshakaf|jeshakaf]] || [[word:sheshakaf|sheshakaf]] || [[word:keshakaf|keshakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshakaf|thothoshakaf]] || [[word:jojoshakaf|jojoshakaf]] || [[word:shoshoshakaf|shoshoshakaf]] || [[word:kokoshakaf|kokoshakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshakaf|thoshakaf]] || [[word:joshakaf|joshakaf]] || [[word:shoshakaf|shoshakaf]] || [[word:koshakaf|koshakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshakaf|thoshakaf]] || [[word:joshakaf|joshakaf]] || [[word:shoshakaf|shoshakaf]] || [[word:koshakaf|koshakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshakaf|thĂŠshakaf]] || [[word:jĂŠshakaf|jĂŠshakaf]] || [[word:shĂŠshakaf|shĂŠshakaf]] || [[word:kĂŠshakaf|kĂŠshakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashakaf|thathashakaf]] || [[word:jajashakaf|jajashakaf]] || [[word:shashashakaf|shashashakaf]] || [[word:kakashakaf|kakashakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashakaf|thashakaf]] || [[word:jashakaf|jashakaf]] || [[word:shashakaf|shashakaf]] || [[word:kashakaf|kashakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashakaf|thashakaf]] || [[word:jashakaf|jashakaf]] || [[word:shashakaf|shashakaf]] || [[word:kashakaf|kashakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashakaf|shashakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashakaf|goshashakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashakaf|gokishashakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashakafnĂŒ|shashakafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashakafnknĂŒ|goshashakafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakafnĂŒ|gokishashakafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashakafshĂ«|shashakafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashakafnkshĂ«|goshashakafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashakafshĂ«|gokishashakafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakafro|shashakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakafnkro|goshashakafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakafro|gokishashakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakafmu|shashakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakafnkmu|goshashakafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakafmu|gokishashakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashakafsher|shashakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashakafnksher|goshashakafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashakafsher|gokishashakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashakafng|shashakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashakafnkng|goshashakafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashakafng|gokishashakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashakafya|shashakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashakafnkya|goshashakafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashakafya|gokishashakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashakafyam|shashakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashakafnkyam|goshashakafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashakafyam|gokishashakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakafnĂŒshĂ«|shashakafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashakafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashakafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakafnĂŒro|shashakafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakafnknĂŒro|goshashakafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakafnĂŒro|gokishashakafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakafnĂŒmu|shashakafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakafnknĂŒmu|goshashakafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakafnĂŒmu|gokishashakafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakafshĂ«nĂŒ|shashakafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashakafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashakafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakafshĂ«ro|shashakafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakafnkshĂ«ro|goshashakafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakafshĂ«ro|gokishashakafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakafshĂ«mu|shashakafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakafnkshĂ«mu|goshashakafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakafshĂ«mu|gokishashakafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakafronĂŒ|shashakafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakafnkronĂŒ|goshashakafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakafronĂŒ|gokishashakafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakafroshĂ«|shashakafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakafnkroshĂ«|goshashakafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakafroshĂ«|gokishashakafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakafromu|shashakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakafnkromu|goshashakafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakafromu|gokishashakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakafmunĂŒ|shashakafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakafnkmunĂŒ|goshashakafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakafmunĂŒ|gokishashakafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakafmushĂ«|shashakafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakafnkmushĂ«|goshashakafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakafmushĂ«|gokishashakafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakafmuro|shashakafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakafnkmuro|goshashakafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakafmuro|gokishashakafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
